SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:40am
Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr. Clerk-Param Natt, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Caroline Bokman represented DNA Lounge, appears in Pro Per. Respondent, Alberto Silva owner of Pacific Automated, LLC appears with counsel Erin A. Levine. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Stumpf.
